data.body: 1fdc GREEN: added 2 real-push/fetch/merge tests to test_concurrency_regression.py (scenario A: far-past fold + young-live bounds low snapshot ts, real remote append visible no repair; scenario B: far-future snapshot ts forces orphan, real fsck --repair-snapshots converges both clones byte-equal + specific UUID present in both). File 19/19 pass. Documented HLC next_tick-monotonicity finding: used purpose-built far-past ticket (REBAR_HLC=0) since fixture seed CREATE floors to current time. Committing stacked on 1d1b.
